title: 5pc Kitchen Knife Block Set - Brooklyn Range by Taylors Eye Witness. Chrome Coloured Bolsters, Finely Ground Razor Sharp Stainless Steel Blades. Soft Grip Handles. Set in Matching Rotating Holder.
features: ✅ IN THE BOX - Spinning knife holding block with black & chrome finish. Kitchen tools; 3 ½” 9cm PARING (de-veining, removing seeds), 5” 12cm ALL PURPOSE COOK'S (cutting fruit/veg e.g. tomato), 8” 20cm BREAD (loaf, bloomer, bun, bap, baguette, muffin, etc.), 8” 20cm CARVING (meat) and large universal 8” 20cm CHEF'S KNIFE (general purpose). You won't need any other knives in your cutlery drawer!

✅ UBER STYLISH DESIGN - The sleek contemporary design of this knife set and block has global appeal as it is in keeping with the modern and clean kitchen designs of today. The smooth lines of the knife handles and the simple design of the knife block allow for easy cleaning, keeping them hygienic as well as looking good. The bold black colour with the shine of the Chrome bolsters won't look out of place in any modern home or professional kitchen.

✅ EFFORTLESS CUTTING AND SLICING - The contemporary stylish handle is not simply for aesthetics. Ergonomically designed for good grip, the soft touch handle provides comfort for right or left handed users, even after prolonged use. The rubberised, sleek black handle is also hygienic. Keeps you in command to control the thickness of each cut, down to laser thin slices. Use for chopping, mincing, slicing, dicing, rocking.

✅ 2 YEAR GUARANTEE - Sheffield-based Taylor's Eye Witness has over 150 years of experience in kitchen tools. Using only the finest, highest quality metal, materials and workmanship. We are confident in our knives, we offer a 'No Quibble' warranty. If in the unlikely event that your knife set and/or holder should become defective under normal kitchen use, we will repair or replace it for up to 2 years from the purchase date. You needn't look anywhere else.

✅ DISHWASHER SAFE - Care: Best used on plastic, wooden or medium-dense chopping board. Recommended: best sharpened with a Taylor's Eye Witness Chantry sharpener. What are you waiting for? Do your culinary and gourmet skills justice with this complete restaurant quality modern classic kit containing all the essential knives for beginners to the professional cooking elite. Also makes an excellent gift/present idea for bride/groom, weddings, anniversary, starter home.
description: Product Description Taylor's Eye Witness was founded by John Taylor in the early part of the 19th Century. They have stood the test of time through an unrelenting dedication to quality, service andgood old fashioned technical know-how in the design and production of kitchen knives and scissors. What they don't know about knives isn't worth knowing! Box Contains 1 x Contains: Paring Knife, All Purpose Knife, Cooks Knife, Carving Knife and Bread Knife Along with a stylish Knife Block
